key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh status display from D-Bus (in seconds)

key.name: command-threshold
key.description: Minimum confidence percentage required to execute voice commands

key.name: command-endpoint-silence
key.description: Seconds of silence after you stop speaking before the command is executed. Keep ≥0.45 so multi-word phrases are not split. Lower is faster but less accurate.

key.name: incomplete-phrase-wait
key.description: How long to wait/merge fragments of a partial command like "open …" before giving up.

key.name: hotword
key.description: The word used to activate command mode from normal mode

key.name: gpu-acceleration
key.description: Prefer CUDA when Willow was built with GPU sherpa-onnx (auto via deploy-dev.sh / makepkg). Falls back to CPU automatically.
